privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Learn how LeadDistro protects your data and the privacy of your information and your leads' information.

s1.title: 1. Information we collect
s1.desc: LeadDistro collects the following information when you use our service:
s1.l1: Account data: name, email, and password (stored with bcrypt hash) upon registration.
s1.l2: Company data: organization name and sales team configuration.
s1.l3: Lead data: the prospect information your CRM sends through the LeadDistro API (name, email, phone, or other fields you configure).
s1.l4: Usage data: activity logs, access IP, and service usage metrics.

s2.title: 2. How we use your information
s2.desc: We use the collected information to:
s2.l1: Provide, maintain, and improve the lead distribution service.
s2.l3: Send you transactional notifications (account confirmation, limit alerts, password recovery).
s2.l4: Detect and prevent fraud or unauthorized use.
s2.footer: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for commercial purposes.

s3.title: 3. Data isolation between tenants
s3.desc: Each company (tenant) operates in a completely isolated environment. Your leads, sellers, and configuration data are never accessible from another account. Isolation is implemented at the database level through unique tenant identifiers on each record.

s4.title: 4. Data security
s4.desc: We implement the following security measures:
s4.l1: All communications are encrypted via HTTPS/TLS.
s4.l2: Passwords are stored with bcrypt hash (never in plain text).
s4.l3: API access requires authentication via JWT with expiration.
s4.l4: Data is stored in MongoDB Atlas with automatic backups.

s5.title: 5. Third-party services
s5.desc: LeadDistro uses the following service providers:
s5.footer: These providers have their own privacy policies and only receive the information necessary to provide their service.

s6.title: 6. Data retention and deletion
s6.desc: Your data is kept as long as your account is active. If you cancel your account, you can request the complete deletion of your data through support. Billing data may be kept for legal obligations according to applicable law.

s7.title: 7. Your rights
s7.l1: Access the personal data we have about you.
s7.l3: Request the deletion of your account and data.
s7.l4: Export your leads in CSV format from the dashboard.
s7.footer: To exercise any of these rights, contact us through support.

s8.title: 8. Changes to this policy
s8.desc: We may update this policy occasionally. We will notify you of significant changes via email. Continued use of the service after the changes implies your acceptance of the new policy.

s9.title: 9. Contact
s9.desc: For inquiries about this privacy policy, contact us through support or visit www.leaddistro.site.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Read the terms and conditions of use for the LeadDistro platform.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
s1.desc: By creating an account and using LeadDistro, you accept these Terms of Service in their entirety. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you may not use the service.

s2.title: 2. Description of service
s2.desc: LeadDistro is a SaaS platform for automatic lead distribution for sales teams. The service includes:
s2.l1: Automatic lead distribution via webhook and assignment algorithm by teams and sellers.
s2.l2: Dashboard of metrics and lead tracking.
s2.l3: User management with roles (Manager, Viewer, Seller).
s2.l4: Integration with CRMs and automation tools via webhook.

s3.title: 3. Accounts and registration
s3.desc: To use LeadDistro, you must create an account with true and up-to-date information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and for all activities that occur under your account.
s3.footer: You can invite users to your organization (tenant). You are responsible for how those users use the service.

s4.title: 4. Subscription and payments
s4.p1: Test period: By registering, you get a 7-day free trial without requiring a credit card. When the test period expires, the account remains inactive until a subscription is activated.
s4.p2: Monthly subscription: The subscription plan costs $25 USD per month. Payments are processed through dLocalGo.
s4.p3: Renewal: The subscription is automatically renewed each month through dLocalGo. You don't need to do anything to keep it active.
s4.p4: Refunds: We do not offer refunds for periods already used. If you cancel before expiration, you can use the service until the paid period expires.

s5.title: 5. Acceptable use
s5.desc: By using LeadDistro, you agree to:
s5.l1: Not use the service for illegal or unauthorized activities.
s5.l2: Not attempt to access data of other tenants or users.
s5.l3: Not reverse engineer, decompile, or modify the service.
s5.l4: Not intentionally overload the service infrastructure.
s5.l5: Comply with the privacy and data protection laws applicable in your country regarding the leads you process.

s6.title: 6. Data ownership
s6.p1: The data you upload to LeadDistro (leads, sellers, settings) is your property. LeadDistro does not claim any rights over them.
s6.p2: By using the service, you grant us a limited license to process that data solely for the purpose of providing the service to you.

s7.title: 7. Service availability
s7.p1: We strive to keep LeadDistro available 24 hours a day, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted availability. We may perform scheduled maintenance with reasonable notice.
s7.p2: We are not responsible for losses resulting from service interruptions, failure of third parties (MongoDB, Vercel, Koyeb), or force majeure.

s8.title: 8. Limitation of liability
s8.p1: LeadDistro is provided 'as is' and 'as available'. In no case shall we be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use the service.
s8.p2: Our maximum liability in any circumstance will be limited to the amount paid for the service in the last 3 months.

s9.title: 9. Cancellation and termination
s9.p1: By you: You can cancel your account at any time. Your account will remain active until the end of the paid period.
s9.p2: By us: We reserve the right to suspend or cancel accounts that violate these terms, with or without prior notice depending on the severity of the violation.
s9.footer: Upon cancellation, you can export your data from the dashboard before the account closing.

s10.title: 10. Modifications
s10.p1: We may modify these terms at any time. We will notify you of significant changes via email at least 7 days in advance. Continued use of the service implies acceptance of the updated terms.

s11.title: 11. Applicable law
s11.desc: These terms are governed by the laws of the Argentine Republic. Any dispute will be resolved in the ordinary courts of the city of Buenos Aires.

s12.title: 12. Contact
s12.desc: For inquiries about these terms, contact us through support or visit www.leaddistro.site.

meta.title: LeadDistro | Automatic Lead Distribution for Agencies
meta.description: Optimize your sales team with LeadDistro. Smart lead assignment, limits per seller, and real-time dashboard for HubSpot, GHL, and monday.com.
meta.ogDescription: Assign each lead to the right seller automatically based on capacity and limits. Integration with any CRM.
meta.keywords: lead distribution, sales automation, round robin, hubspot integration, gohighlevel leads, monday.com leads
meta.schemaDescription: LeadDistro assigns each lead to the right seller based on capacity, team, and limits — no manual intervention, no lost leads.

banner.error: We couldn't verify the payment. Try again in a few minutes.

features.title: Everything your sales team needs
features.subtitle: A system designed so that no lead is left unattended and each seller works at their maximum capacity.
features.algoDesc: Each incoming lead is assigned to the most available seller on the proportional team. The algorithm considers weekly capacity, daily load, and seller ratio.

algoSteps.1: Lead enters via webhook from the CRM
algoSteps.2: Target team is determined by percentage
algoSteps.3: Seller with the lowest ratio is selected

teams.title: Teams with configurable percentages
teams.desc: Divide your sales force into teams and define what percentage of leads each one receives. CH 60% — MH 40%, or any combination that adds up to 100%.

limits.title: Daily and weekly limits per seller
limits.desc: Configure how many leads each seller can handle per day and per week. When they reach the limit, the system automatically skips them.

fallback.title: Backup sellers (Fallback)
fallback.desc: Configure up to 2 backup sellers. When everyone reaches their limit, new leads are automatically redirected to them so no lead is left unassigned.

metrics.title: Real-time metrics dashboard
metrics.desc: Visualize leads by seller, funnel stages, statuses, and team distribution. Filter by period, seller, team, or stage.

howItWorks.title: How LeadDistro works
howItWorks.subtitle: From when a lead enters your CRM until it's in your seller's hands — all automatic.

1.title: Webhook from the CRM
1.desc: Your CRM automatically sends the lead to your tenant's unique URL. Just paste the URL into your workflow.

2.title: Assignment algorithm
2.desc: The system determines the team by percentage and selects the seller with the most available capacity (lowest load/limit ratio).

3.title: Seller notification
3.desc: Your CRM receives the response webhook with the assigned seller's data and executes your notification workflow.

4.title: Lead registered
4.desc: The lead remains in LeadDistro with seller, team, stage, and date. Available in the dashboard with all filters.

roles.title: Roles designed for your team
roles.subtitle: Each person sees and can do exactly what they need. Your account includes Manager and Sellers.

manager.title: Team Manager
manager.desc: Full access to their tenant. Configures teams, sellers, periods, stages, and CRM integration.

viewer.title: Viewer / Supervisor
viewer.desc: Can see all leads and edit their information, but cannot create or delete records or access settings.

seller.title: Seller
seller.desc: Access only their own assigned leads. Sees their individual capacity metrics and can manage lead status.

integrations.title: Integrations with HubSpot, GoHighLevel and monday.com
integrations.subtitle: LeadDistro integrates perfectly with your CRM and automation tools.

config.title: Setup in less than 5 minutes
config.subtitle: You only need to copy your tenant's URL and paste it into your tool's workflow. No code, no complex APIs.

1.title: Copy the webhook URL
1.desc: From LeadDistro settings, copy your tenant's unique URL.

2.title: Paste it in your CRM workflow
2.desc: In your CRM's 'new contact' workflow, add the webhook action pointing to that URL.

3.title: Configure the response webhook
3.desc: LeadDistro sends you the assigned seller's name so you can notify them from your CRM.

comparison.title: Why you need LeadDistro if you already have a CRM
comparison.subtitle: CRMs are great for managing data, but LeadDistro is the brain that optimizes your team's workload.
comparison.footer: LeadDistro doesn't replace your CRM, it powers it so no lead is lost.

availability.title: Available Countries
availability.subtitle: LeadDistro is operating for agencies in the fastest growing markets.

items.countries: Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Ecuador, Guatemala, Mexico, Paraguay, Panama, Peru, and Uruguay.

pricing.title: Simple and transparent
pricing.subtitle: A single plan, no annual contracts. Pay month to month and cancel whenever you want.

monthly.title: Monthly Plan
monthly.desc: Everything your agency needs to not lose a single lead.

setup.title: Setup & Configuration
setup.desc: We configure everything for you. Ready in less than 24 hours.

pricing.note: Have questions? Chat with us on WhatsApp and we will respond instantly.

faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.subtitle: If you have more questions, chat with us on WhatsApp and we will respond instantly.

items.q: How does automatic lead distribution work?
items.a: When your CRM sends a lead to the LeadDistro webhook, the system identifies the target team based on the configured percentages, and within that team selects the seller with the most available capacity (lowest load/limit ratio). Everything happens in milliseconds and the result is automatically returned to the CRM.

items.q: What CRMs does LeadDistro integrate with?
items.a: LeadDistro integrates with any platform that supports webhooks: GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, ActiveCampaign, Make, Zapier, n8n, and many more. If your CRM can send an HTTP POST, it works with LeadDistro.

items.q: What happens if all sellers reach their limit?
items.a: You can configure up to 2 backup sellers (fallback). When all active sellers reach their daily or weekly limit, leads are automatically redirected to those backup sellers. This way, no lead is left unassigned.

items.q: Can I have multiple teams with different distributions?
items.a: Yes. You can create as many teams as you need and assign a percentage of the total leads to each one. For example: Team A receives 60% and Team B receives 40%. Each team has its own sellers, limits, and settings.

items.q: What happens when the trial period expires?
items.a: When the 7-day trial period expires, your account is in an inactive state. You don't lose any data — by subscribing for $25 USD/month you regain access immediately with all your settings intact.

items.q: Can I cancel at any time?
items.a: Yes, without any mandatory stay or penalties. When you cancel your subscription, it does not renew the next month. Your data remains available until the end of the paid period.

Yes. Each company has its own isolated tenant — no data is accessible from another account. Communications are encrypted via HTTPS and passwords are saved with bcrypt hash. We do not share or sell data of any kind.

items.q: What does the setup service include?
items.a: The setup service ($100 USD, one-time payment) includes: complete system configuration, integration with your CRM, seller and team setup, webhooks configuration, and a training session for your team. Ready in less than 24 hours.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: Sign up in seconds and start distributing leads today. 7 days free, no credit card required. From $25 USD/month.

footer.desc: Smart lead distribution for modern sales teams.

crm.timezoneInfo: The timezone is used to correctly calculate 'today' and 'this week' leads.
crm.webhookInfo: The system will POST to this URL every time it assigns a seller to a lead. Compatible with GHL, HubSpot, Make, Zapier, or any service that accepts webhooks.
